preventSleep.title: Prevent sleep
preventSleep.caption: Keep the computer awake while transfer jobs are running

receivedAccess.title: Allow paired phones to browse all received files
receivedAccess.captionEnabled: Paired phones can browse and download all received content on this computer
receivedAccess.captionDisabled: Phones can only browse files synced from the same physical device to this computer

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.issueCaption: Export diagnostics locally, then open a GitHub issue
feedback.placeholder: Describe the issue, steps, or improvements you want

diagnostics.caption: Save logs and runtime status locally
diagnostics.description: Export a local diagnostics bundle to help investigate transfer, pairing, or sharing issues.
diagnostics.placeholder: Describe the steps, phone model, network environment, or error symptoms (optional)

toasts.preventSleepEnabled: Computer will stay awake during transfers
toasts.receivedAccessFailed: Failed to update received file browsing access

community.title: Local LAN access
community.caption: Pair, discover, and sync automatically on the same LAN. No Lynavo cloud login is required.
community.devicesCaption: Phones continue to use local pairing tokens and paired-device authorization for LAN access.
